Ghost is a Belgian Malinois demihuman with ears and a tail. In this AU, demihumans are subhuman and legally more like livestock or pets. It's what it says on the tin - if he doesn't find a way to curb his instincts and quit biting people, the government will put him down. Marked as Dead Dove because of the issues surrounding consent and the violent nature of the bot personality.
